$comment: run: build and run a workspace's main, capturing its output. A thin wrapper over the run_app tool so it is operator-friendly with --ws: `ratchet flow . run --ws <proj> ""` (console: `/flow run --ws <proj>`). Running needs no model, so this is a single deterministic action node, not a generate/repair chain. proj = $workspace; the build and tests remain the oracle (see compose/module_check).
summary: Build and run a workspace's main, capturing stdout/stderr/exit (a server is stopped after a few seconds).
